imagebuilder.imagerecipe.AdditionalInsta.Docs: Before you create a new AMI, Image Builder launches temporary Amazon EC2 instances to build and test your image configuration. Instance configuration adds a layer of control over those instances. You can define settings and add scripts to run when an instance is launched from your AMI.

imagebuilder.imagerecipe.BlockDeviceMapp.Docs: The block device mappings to apply when creating images from this recipe.

imagebuilder.imagerecipe.Components.Docs: The components of the image recipe. Components are orchestration documents that define a sequence of steps for downloading, installing, configuring, and testing software packages. They also define validation and security hardening steps. A component is defined using a YAML document format.

imagebuilder.imagerecipe.Description.Docs: The description of the image recipe.

imagebuilder.imagerecipe.Name.Docs: The name of the image recipe.

imagebuilder.imagerecipe.ParentImage.Docs: The parent image of the image recipe. The string must be either an Image ARN (SemVers is ok) or an AMI ID.

imagebuilder.imagerecipe.Tags.Docs: The tags of the image recipe.

imagebuilder.imagerecipe.Version.Docs: The semantic version of the image recipe.

imagebuilder.imagerecipe.WorkingDirector.Docs: The working directory to be used during build and test workflows.
